mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO M_NODE_IN_OUT_COLUMN(OUTPUT_TABLE_NAME,DB_TYPE,OUTPUT_COLUMN_NAME,INPUT_TABLE_NAME,INPUT_COLUMN_NAME ,PROCESS_JSON, CASE_STR , NODE_ID) VALUES(#{item.outputTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.dbType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.outputColumnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.inputTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.inputColumnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.processJson,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{item.caseStr,jdbcType=CLOB},#{item.nodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: select distinct output_column_name from m_node_in_out_column where upper(output_table_name) = upper(#{tableName})

select input_column_name as source, output_column_name as target from( select distinct input_column_name||'_'||output_column_name, input_column_name ,output_column_name from m_node_in_out_column where upper(output_table_name) = upper(#{outputTableName}) and upper(input_table_name) = upper(#{inputTableName})
and upper(input_column_name) = upper(#{columnName})
and upper(output_column_name) = upper(#{columnName})
)

select outputTableName, dbType, outputColumnName, inputTableName, inputColumnName, nodeId, processJson, caseStr from(select OUTPUT_TABLE_NAME as outputTableName,DB_TYPE as dbType,OUTPUT_COLUMN_NAME as outputColumnName, INPUT_TABLE_NAME as inputTableName,INPUT_COLUMN_NAME as inputColumnName, NODE_ID as nodeId, PROCESS_JSON as processJson ,CASE_STR as caseStr ,ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by OUTPUT_TABLE_NAME||'-'||OUTPUT_COLUMN_NAME||'-'||INPUT_TABLE_NAME||'-'||INPUT_COLUMN_NAME order by INSERT_DATE desc) as num from m_node_in_out_column ) where num =1
